  "claims": [
    "The Distressed Hospital Loan Program was authored in response to the imminent closure of dozens of hospitals across the state.",
    "The closure of Madera Hospital resulted in hundreds of thousands of community members being left without emergency care.",
    "The significant financial assistance provided to Madera Community Hospital is an important step towards reopening it.",
